name: Mickey Mouse

abilities.rulesText: When you play this character, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

subtitle: Detective
rulesText: GET A CLUE When you play this character, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavorText: Wherever the seaweed had come from, Mickey was sure of one thing: something fishy was going on.

_namedAbilityStubs.rulesText: When you play this character, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
_namedAbilityStubs.raw: GET A CLUE When you play this character, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

name: HeiHei
subtitle: Boat Snack
rulesText: <Support> (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character’s {S} this turn.)
flavorText:
“Sometimes, our strengths lie beneath the surface. Far beneath, in some cases. . . .”
—Moana

name: Yzma

abilities.rulesText: Whenever this character quests, look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.

subtitle: Alchemist
rulesText: YOU’RE EXCUSED Whenever this character quests, look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.
flavorText: “When I want your opinion, I will give it to you!”

name: Mickey Mouse

abilities.rulesText: Your other Musketeer characters get +1 {S}.

subtitle: Musketeer
rulesText:
<Bodyguard> (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)
ALL FOR ONE Your other Musketeer characters get +1 {S}.

name: Goofy

abilities.rulesText: When you play this character, you may remove up to 2 damage from each of your Musketeer characters.

subtitle: Musketeer
rulesText:
<Bodyguard> (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)
AND TWO FOR TEA! When you play this character, you may remove up to 2 damage from each of your Musketeer characters.
flavorText: “En gawrsh!”

name: Donald Duck

abilities.rulesText: During your turn, your Musketeer characters gain Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

subtitle: Musketeer
rulesText:
<Bodyguard> (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)
STAY ALERT! During your turn, your Musketeer characters gain <Evasive>. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

name: Cinderella

abilities.rulesText: When you play this character, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

subtitle: Knight in Training
rulesText: HAVE COURAGE When you play this character, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.
flavorText: She's always had the heart of a champion—now she'll have the skills, too.

name: Bucky

abilities.rulesText: Whenever you play a Floodborn character, if you used Shift to play them, each opponent chooses and discards a card.

subtitle: Squirrel Squeak Tutor
rulesText: SQUEAK Whenever you play a Floodborn character, each opponent chooses and discards a card.
flavorText:
“There’s a lot of nuance to squirrel.”
—Kronk

name: Minnie Mouse

abilities.rulesText: Whenever you play a second action in a turn, this character gets +2 lore this turn.

subtitle: Wide-Eyed Diver
rulesText:
<Shift> 2 (You may pay 2 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Minnie Mouse.)
<Evasive> (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
UNDERSEA ADVENTURE Whenever you play a second action in a turn, this character gets +2 {L} this turn.

name: Robin Hood

abilities.rulesText: Deal 1 damage to chosen character.

subtitle: Capable Fighter
rulesText: SKIRMISH {E} — Deal 1 damage to chosen character.
flavorText:
“Capable? You don’t know the half of it.” 
—Little John

name: Mickey Mouse

abilities.rulesText: Whenever this character quests, you pay 3 {I} less for the next character you play this turn.

subtitle: Friendly Face
rulesText: GLAD YOU’RE HERE! Whenever this character quests, you pay 3 {I} less for the next character you play this turn.
flavorText: "Come on in—there’s lots to explore."

name: Elsa
subtitle: Gloves Off
rulesText: <Challenger> +3 (While challenging, this character gets +3 {S}.)
flavorText: The power of ice may not stop the flood, but it will help protect Lorcana.

name: Genie

abilities.rulesText: Whenever this character quests, you may play an action with cost 5 or less for free.

subtitle: Powers Unleashed
rulesText:
<Shift> 6 (You may pay 6 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Genie.)
<Evasive> (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
PHENOMENAL COSMIC POWER! Whenever this character quests, you may play an action with cost 5 or less for free.

name: Stitch
subtitle: Abomination
flavorText:
“His destructive programming is taking effect. He will be irresistibly drawn to large cities, where he will back up sewers, reverse street signs, and steal everyone's left shoe.”
—Jumba Jookiba

name: Maleficent
subtitle: Uninvited
flavorText: She had no invitation—and needed no introduction.

name: Maui
subtitle: Demigod
flavorText: When the gods gift you a boat, you take it. The boat’s owner is optional.

name: Gaston
subtitle: Arrogant Hunter
rulesText: <Reckless> (This character can’t quest and must challenge each turn if able.)
flavorText: It’s not arrogance when you really <are> the best.

name: Kit Cloudkicker

abilities.rulesText: When you play this character, you may return chosen opposing character with 2 {S} or less to their player's hand.

subtitle: Tough Guy
rulesText: SKYSURFING When you play this character, you may return chosen opposing character with 2 {S} or less to their player’s hand.
flavorText: “It’s been fun, guys, but I got to be going. Yahoooo!”

name: Jolly Roger

abilities.rulesText: Characters gain Rush while here.
Your Pirate characters may move here for free.

subtitle: Hook's Ship
rulesText:
LOOK ALIVE, YOU SWABS! Characters gain <Rush> while here. (They can challenge the turn they’re played.)
ALL HANDS ON DECK! Your Pirate characters may move here for free.

name: How Far I'll Go
rulesText:
(A character with cost 4 or more can {E} to play this song for free.)
Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

name: John Silver

abilities.rulesText: For each location you have in play, this character gets +1 {L}.

subtitle: Greedy Treasure Seeker
rulesText: CHART YOUR OWN COURSE For each location you have in play, this character gains <Resist> +1 and gets +1 {L}. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)
flavorText: "I was never much good at games. Always hated to lose."

name: Stitch

abilities.rulesText: Whenever you play a character with cost 2 or less, you may exert them to draw a card.

subtitle: Rock Star
rulesText:
<Shift> 4 (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Stitch.)
ADORING FANS Whenever you play a character with cost 2 or less, you may exert them to draw a card.
flavorText: The best part about a beachside concert is that there’s always room for one more.
